items.name_en: Kelly elan Black & Silver
items.name_cn:
Kelly elan Black & Silver
Imported cowhide, cross-grain, hand-waxed thread, full steel hardware
Removable shoulder strap, 2 carrying styles: handbag and underarm bag. Great capacity, super comfortable to carry!!
Dimensions: 27x15x5

items.name_en: kelly Elan Goat Skin 27cm 18 Elephant Grey Silver Hardware
items.name_cn:
kelly Elan Goat Skin 27cm 18 Elephant Grey Silver Hardware
The true first underarm bag of the kelly family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length. A bag with very high daily usage rate~
A graceful slender silhouette, paired with full vintage vibes in kid leather, perfect for storage. The strap length and underarm carry method are very nice!

items.name_en: Kelly Elan, Goat leather, 27cm, 18 Grey, Gold buckle
items.name_cn:
Kelly Elan, Goat leather, 27cm, 18 Grey, Gold buckle
The first true crossbody in the Kelly family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length, a high daily usage rate~
Exquisite and elegant slender silhouette, kid goat leather paired with full vintage vibes, perfect storage. The strap length and crossbody carry method are very nice!

specs.rawTitle:
Kelly Elan, Goat leather, 27cm, 18 Grey, Gold buckle
The first true crossbody in the Kelly family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length, a high daily usage rate~
Exquisite and elegant slender silhouette, kid goat leather paired with full vintage vibes, perfect storage. The strap length and crossbody carry method are very nice!

items.name_en: kelly2424 mini 21cm Evercolor/swift, strongly recommended. Young retro vibe, not only beautiful but also easy to handle in various ways (handheld, single shoulder, crossbody, backpack). The backpack strap style is super practical with ample capacity. Exquisite, elegant, and casual, each style presents a different look.
